productName: SamStep74 A1 ERP HY RBAC and access-control surface
guardrails: Keep RBAC fail-closed: authenticated write endpoints must require explicit permission checks.
Do not broaden finance, tenant, session, audit, or integration permissions to make tests pass.
Preserve intentionally open service/privacy/legal endpoints pinned by open-endpoints-rbac tests.
Keep permission keys catalog-driven and keep helper audit mappings in sync with route behavior.
Do not add network calls, environment-dependent auth bypasses, or database migrations outside the RBAC surface.
